negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: Missing ProviderCacheBuilder TTL/idle configurability and restored 7200s/3600s defaults; local execution cache is fixed-size and created by ExecutionCache::new without time_to_live/time_to_idle configuration.
related_but_insufficient_code: ExecutionCache exists and is used by payload processing, but it exposes size-based fixed caches rather than env-configured TTL/idle caches.

rationale: The later candidate supersedes only the default values introduced by the earlier environment-configurable cache commit, preserving configurability as current behavior.
statement: ProviderCacheBuilder must apply RETH_STATE_CACHE_TTL_SECS and RETH_STATE_CACHE_IDLE_SECS to storage, account, and code caches when valid, and otherwise use restored defaults of 7200 seconds time_to_live and 3600 seconds time_to_idle.
suggested_falsification_tests: Set RETH_STATE_CACHE_TTL_SECS and RETH_STATE_CACHE_IDLE_SECS and assert storage/account/code caches use those durations.
Unset both env vars and assert defaults are 7200s TTL and 3600s idle.
summary: State cache TTL/idle environment configuration is absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Search for ProviderCacheBuilder and RETH_STATE_CACHE_* env vars; current port lacks this cache builder/configuration.
title: State cache defaults are long but environment configurable
